summary: Backend-only regression for Phase Milestone Auto-Poster + 5 function refactors (complete_ad, rate_limit_middleware, get_dating_coach_suggestions, analyze_user_content, generate_date_plan) + server.py route-registry consolidation. 38/39 tests PASSED, 1 xfailed (rate_limit_middleware orphan finding). No 500s across broad-spectrum endpoint smoke (auth, casino, dating, vibe-ridez, profit-share, chairs, founders-pass, agora, economy, multiplayer, admin audit). Milestone queue endpoints fully functional; OG image renders at 41KB PNG; Genesis_25 verified queued with og_image_url + twitter_intent + share_text_short fields; all admin endpoints 401 without cookie.

minor.issue: Middleware is defined and was refactored (helpers _record_request + _exceeded_response extracted per spec), but it is NOT registered on the FastAPI app. config/middleware.py:setup_middleware only adds CORSMiddleware — there is no app.middleware('http')(rate_limit_middleware) or app.add_middleware registration anywhere. Result: X-RateLimit-Limit/Remaining/Reset headers never appear on any response, and NO rate limiting is actually enforced in production. This is orphan dead code. (Appears to be pre-existing — not introduced by this iteration's refactor, but still needs wiring.)

action_items: Wire rate_limit_middleware on the FastAPI app via app.middleware('http')(rate_limit_middleware) inside config/middleware.py:setup_middleware — otherwise the recent refactor (helper extraction) is applied to dead code and no rate limiting is enforced.
Confirm with product whether rate limiting should be enforced in preview (headers are expected per spec but never emitted).
critical_code_review_comments: ORPHAN MIDDLEWARE: middleware/security.py::rate_limit_middleware (+ newly extracted _record_request / _exceeded_response) is not registered on the app. The refactor preserved behavior of dead code. Register via `app.middleware('http')(rate_limit_middleware)` in config/middleware.py.
MilestoneQueue admin endpoints are solid: queue filter, check-now idempotency, mark-posted/skip 404 on unknown, 401 without admin cookie — all green.
OG image generation (PIL) works cleanly on preview (41KB PNG, content-type image/png, 5-min cache header). No font fallback issues observed.

Route-registry refactor is safe: smoke-tested 17 endpoints across auth/casino/dating/vibe-ridez/profit-share/chairs/founders-pass/agora/economy/multiplayer/admin — zero 500s, all expected auth gates (401) preserved.

complete_ad refactor: endpoint still reachable; auth gate returns 401 without cookie; unknown impression returns 404 for authed user. Full success-path (30s≤elapsed≤120s, +50 vibe_credits, impression.completed=true) not executed in this run because no ad impression fixture exists in preview DB — endpoint shapes verified.

AI endpoint refactors: /api/ai/dating-coach returned fallback-shape {suggestions, current_tip} successfully (LLM live or fallback — both paths return 200). /api/ai-content-matching/analyze-content does not 500 for unknown user.

Chairs: /api/chairs/phase returns Genesis @ $5, weight 3.0, remaining_in_phase 18985 — matches spec. /api/chairs/test-buy validates quantity (not 'chairs') — payload shape is `{quantity, payment_ref, invite_code?}`.

success_rate.backend: 97% (38/39 pass, 1 xfail documented as orphan code)

test_credentials: Admin vault: password=GlobalVibez_Founder_2025! code=000000. Demo login: POST /api/auth/demo-login (no body).
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Pre-existing Genesis_25 milestone used. During flip test the status was toggled to posted→skipped, then RESET to 'queued' at end of run so subsequent iterations see the same fixture.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_iter_jan_2026_milestone_and_refactor_regression.py covers milestone queue, OG image, complete_ad shape, AI fallback paths, rate-limit xfail, chairs phase + test-buy. Use demo_user_client fixture for authed user calls and admin_client for vault-protected admin calls. Genesis_25 should be in queued state — if a prior run left it posted/skipped, reset via: mongosh test_database --eval 'db.phase_milestones.updateOne({_id:"Genesis_25"},{$set:{status:"queued"}})'. test-buy requires FOUNDERS_PASS_TEST_MODE=1 or CHAIRS_TEST_MODE=1 in backend/.env (confirmed set in preview).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — refactor regression-only iteration. Only finding is a pre-existing orphan middleware (rate_limit_middleware), not a regression from this iteration's changes.
